elements.text:
• Zero represents 'No Effect'

• If the interval includes zero, the variable is likely just noise

• If it stays positive or negative, the relationship is statistically significant

elements.prompt: A clean, professional flowchart. Top: 'Does interval cross zero?'. Branch 1: 'Yes' -> 'Not Significant'. Branch 2: 'No' -> 'Significant'. High contrast, modern vector style.
